## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Why do you need it?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Example Usage

```typescript
// How would you use this feature?
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references.

## Open Cloud Support

If this involves Roblox APIs, is it supported by Open Cloud?

- [ ] Yes, available via Open Cloud
- [ ] No, requires ROBLOSECURITY (not supported)
- [ ] Unknown
